---
title: "데이터 품질 및 적합성 평가 보고서"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%Y년 %m월 %d일 %H:%M')`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    highlight: tango
    toc: true
    toc_float:
      collapsed: false
      smooth_scroll: true
    toc_depth: 3
    number_sections: false
    self_contained: true
    css: report_style.css
params:
  df:            NULL
  score_result:  NULL
  purpose:       "미입력"
  filename:      "데이터"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE,
                      fig.width = 8, fig.height = 4, dpi = 150)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

df           <- params$df
score_result <- params$score_result
purpose      <- params$purpose
filename     <- params$filename

dim_labels <- c(
  completeness = "완전성",
  consistency  = "일관성",
  uniqueness   = "유일성",
  accuracy     = "정확성",
  timeliness   = "적시성",
  validity     = "유효성"
)

score_color <- function(s) {
  if (is.na(s))    return("#aaaaaa")
  if (s >= 80)     return("#1D9E75")
  if (s >= 60)     return("#BA7517")
  return("#E24B4A")
}

badge_class <- function(status) {
  switch(status,
    ok   = "badge-ok",
    warn = "badge-warn",
    fail = "badge-fail",
    "badge-warn"
  )
}
badge_label <- function(status) {
  switch(status, ok = "양호", warn = "주의", fail = "위험", "?")
}
```

:::: report-header
::: report-meta
```         
<span class="meta-item">📄 `r filename`</span>
<span class="meta-sep">·</span>
<span class="meta-item">🎯 사용 목적: `r purpose`</span>
<span class="meta-sep">·</span>
<span class="meta-item">🕒 `r format(Sys.time(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')`</span>
```
:::
::::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 1. 요약

```{r summary-cards}
meta <- score_result$meta
total <- score_result$total

grade <- if (total >= 80) "우수" else if (total >= 60) "보통" else "미흡"
grade_color <- score_color(total)
```

::::::: card-grid
::: metric-card
```         
<div class="metric-label">총 행 수</div>
<div class="metric-value">`r format(meta$n_rows, big.mark=",")`</div>
```
:::

::: metric-card
```         
<div class="metric-label">총 컬럼 수</div>
<div class="metric-value">`r meta$n_cols`</div>
```
:::

::: metric-card
```         
<div class="metric-label">결측 셀 수</div>
<div class="metric-value warn">`r format(meta$missing_cells, big.mark=",")`</div>
```
:::

::: metric-card
```         
<div class="metric-label">중복 행 수</div>
<div class="metric-value warn">`r format(meta$dup_rows, big.mark=",")`</div>
```
:::
:::::::

::::: {.score-banner style="border-left: 5px solid `r grade_color`;"}
::: score-left
```         
<div class="score-number" style="color:`r grade_color`;">`r total`</div>
<div class="score-unit">/ 100</div>
```
:::

::: score-right
```         
<div class="score-grade" style="color:`r grade_color`;">품질 종합 점수 — `r grade`</div>
<div class="score-desc">측정 가능한 차원(완전성·유일성·유효성)의 평균값입니다. 일관성·정확성·적시성은 도메인 정보가 필요하여 이번 평가에서 제외되었습니다.</div>
```
:::
:::::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 2. 품질 차원별 점수

```{r dimension-chart, fig.height=3.5}
dims <- score_result$dimensions
dim_df <- data.frame(
  name  = dim_labels[names(dims)],
  score = unlist(dims),
  measured = !is.na(unlist(dims)),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
) %>%
  mutate(
    score_show = ifelse(is.na(score), 0, score),
    fill_color = case_when(
      !measured       ~ "#dddddd",
      score >= 80     ~ "#1D9E75",
      score >= 60     ~ "#BA7517",
      TRUE            ~ "#E24B4A"
    ),
    label = ifelse(measured, paste0(score, "점"), "측정불가")
  )

ggplot(dim_df, aes(x = reorder(name, score_show), y = score_show, fill = fill_color)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.55, show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label, y = score_show + 2),
            hjust = 0, size = 3.5, color = "#444444") +
  scale_fill_identity() +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 115), breaks = c(0, 25, 50, 75, 100)) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "점수 (0–100)") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor   = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y        = element_text(size = 11, color = "#333333"),
    plot.margin        = margin(8, 24, 8, 8)
  )
```

```{r dimension-table}
dim_tbl <- data.frame(
  차원     = dim_labels[names(dims)],
  점수     = sapply(unlist(dims), function(s) if (is.na(s)) "측정불가" else paste0(s, "점")),
  상태     = sapply(unlist(dims), function(s) {
    if (is.na(s)) "—"
    else if (s >= 80) "양호"
    else if (s >= 60) "주의"
    else "위험"
  }),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

kable(dim_tbl, align = c("l","c","c"), row.names = FALSE) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped","hover"), full_width = FALSE) %>%
  column_spec(2, bold = TRUE) %>%
  row_spec(which(dim_tbl$상태 == "위험"), color = "#A32D2D", background = "#FCEBEB") %>%
  row_spec(which(dim_tbl$상태 == "주의"), color = "#854F0B", background = "#FAEEDA")
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 3. 컬럼별 품질 상세

```{r column-table}
cd <- score_result$column_detail

cd_display <- cd %>%
  mutate(
    missing_pct = paste0(missing_pct, "%"),
    dup_pct     = paste0(dup_pct, "%"),
    outliers    = ifelse(is.na(outliers), "—", as.character(outliers)),
    상태        = badge_label(status)
  ) %>%
  select(
    컬럼명  = column,
    타입     = type,
    결측률   = missing_pct,
    중복률   = dup_pct,
    이상값   = outliers,
    상태
  )

kable(cd_display, align = c("l","c","c","c","c","c"), row.names = FALSE) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped","hover","condensed"), full_width = TRUE) %>%
  row_spec(which(cd$status == "fail"), color = "#A32D2D", background = "#FCEBEB") %>%
  row_spec(which(cd$status == "warn"), color = "#854F0B", background = "#FAEEDA")
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 4. 시각화

### 4-1. 결측값 분포

```{r missing-plot, fig.height=3}
miss_df <- data.frame(
  column      = score_result$column_detail$column,
  missing_pct = score_result$column_detail$missing_pct
) %>% filter(missing_pct > 0) %>%
  arrange(desc(missing_pct))

if (nrow(miss_df) == 0) {
  cat("> ✅ 결측값이 없습니다.")
} else {
  ggplot(miss_df, aes(x = reorder(column, missing_pct), y = missing_pct,
                      fill = ifelse(missing_pct >= 10, "#E24B4A", "#BA7517"))) +
    geom_col(width = 0.55, show.legend = FALSE) +
    geom_text(aes(label = paste0(missing_pct, "%")), hjust = -0.1, size = 3.5) +
    scale_fill_identity() +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, max(miss_df$missing_pct) * 1.25)) +
    coord_flip() +
    labs(x = NULL, y = "결측률 (%)") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
          plot.margin = margin(8, 32, 8, 8))
}
```

### 4-2. 수치형 컬럼 이상값 (박스플롯)

```{r outlier-plot, fig.height=4}
num_cols <- names(df)[sapply(df, is.numeric)]

if (length(num_cols) == 0) {
  cat("> 수치형 컬럼이 없습니다.")
} else {
  plot_df <- df %>%
    select(all_of(num_cols)) %>%
    tidyr::pivot_longer(cols = everything(), names_to = "variable", values_to = "value") %>%
    filter(!is.na(value))

  ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = variable, y = value)) +
    geom_boxplot(fill = "#B5D4F4", color = "#185FA5",
                 outlier.color = "#E24B4A", outlier.alpha = 0.6,
                 width = 0.5) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = "값") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1),
          panel.grid.major.x = element_blank())
}
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 5. 적합성 평가

```{r suitability}
total <- score_result$total
suit_score <- round(total * 0.85 + ifelse(total >= 80, 10, ifelse(total >= 60, 0, -10)))
suit_label <- if (suit_score >= 75) "적합" else if (suit_score >= 55) "조건부 적합" else "부적합"
suit_color <- score_color(suit_score)
```

::: {.suit-banner style="border-left:5px solid `r suit_color`; background: #f9f9f9; padding:1rem 1.25rem; border-radius:0 8px 8px 0; margin-bottom:1.5rem;"}
<strong style="font-size:1.1rem; color:`r suit_color`;">`r suit_label`</strong>

<p style="margin:.5rem 0 0; color:#444; font-size:.9rem;">

사용 목적 <em>"`r purpose`"</em>에 대한 이 데이터의 적합성 평가 결과입니다.<br> 품질 종합 점수 <strong>`r total`점</strong>을 기반으로 산출된 적합성 점수는 <strong>`r suit_score`점</strong>입니다.

</p>
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 6. 주요 발견사항 및 권고사항

```{r findings}
cd  <- score_result$column_detail
fail_cols <- cd$column[cd$status == "fail"]
warn_cols <- cd$column[cd$status == "warn"]
```

```{r findings-list, results='asis'}
if (length(fail_cols) > 0) {
  cat(paste0(
    '<div class="finding fail">',
    '⚠️ <strong>즉시 조치 필요 (위험)</strong>: ',
    paste(fail_cols, collapse = ", "),
    ' 컬럼에서 결측률 10% 이상이 확인되었습니다. 원본 데이터를 재수집하거나 대체값 처리 전략을 수립하세요.',
    '</div>\n'
  ))
}

if (length(warn_cols) > 0) {
  cat(paste0(
    '<div class="finding warn">',
    '🔔 <strong>검토 권고 (주의)</strong>: ',
    paste(warn_cols, collapse = ", "),
    ' 컬럼에서 경미한 품질 문제가 확인되었습니다. 분석 전 전처리를 권고합니다.',
    '</div>\n'
  ))
}

if (score_result$meta$dup_rows > 0) {
  cat(paste0(
    '<div class="finding warn">',
    '🔔 <strong>중복 행 ', score_result$meta$dup_rows, '건</strong>: ',
    '분석 목적에 따라 중복 제거 여부를 결정하세요.',
    '</div>\n'
  ))
}

if (length(fail_cols) == 0 && length(warn_cols) == 0 && score_result$meta$dup_rows == 0) {
  cat('<div class="finding ok">✅ 주요 품질 문제가 발견되지 않았습니다.</div>\n')
}
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: report-footer
본 보고서는 자동 생성된 데이터 품질 평가 결과입니다. 도메인 전문가 검토를 병행하시기 바랍니다.
:::
